versions.notes: Replaced MiniMax M2.7 models with MiniMax M3 after checking the official MiniMax pay-as-you-go pricing page. MiniMax M3 supports a 1M context window and uses separate prices for input at or below 512k tokens and input above 512k tokens. DeepSeek V4 Pro prices are unchanged, but the discount-period note was replaced with the official post-promotion pricing note. Expanded Doubao Seed 2.0 pricing into official input-length tiers from Volcengine. Other tracked prices are carried forward from the previous snapshot.

conditions.note: limited quantity for a limited time
limited quantity for a limited time
limited quantity for a limited time

versions.notes: Replaced Claude Opus 4.7 with Claude Opus 4.8 after checking official provider pricing pages. Opus 4.8 keeps the same standard Claude API token prices as Opus 4.7. Other tracked standard token prices were rechecked and no additional changes were applied. CNY rows are converted to USD for sorting and comparison with the displayed USD/CNY rate.

Expanded provider dataset. Prices come from official public pricing pages and preserve the provider's official currency. CNY rows are converted to USD for sorting and comparison with the displayed USD/CNY rate. Prices do not include batch, priority, tool-call, regional uplift, free-tier, or limited quota promotions unless the condition explicitly says so.
